summary: Tested all new features: QuickHostBar on game board, GMP toggle button, Admin pending questions tab with custom AI prompt textarea, and PATCH /api/admin/questions/pending/{id} backend endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin login route is /admin not /admin/login — the review request mentioned /admin/login which doesn't exist in React Router (routes are /admin and /admin/dashboard). This is just a documentation mismatch, not a bug.
AdminDashboard.jsx has React Hook useEffect/useCallback missing dependencies warnings (eslint), not blocking but could cause stale closure bugs.

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 passed, 1 skipped - no pending questions available)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features tested and working: (1) QuickHostBar visible on /game with data-testid quick-t1-plus-300/600/900, quick-t2-plus-300/600/900, quick-switch-turn - all functional. (2) GMP toggle button (data-testid=gmp-toggle-btn) works - opens GameMasterPanel. (3) Admin pending tab at /admin/dashboard (tab-pending data-testid) shows import-custom-prompt textarea and import-file-btn. (4) PATCH /api/admin/questions/pending/{id} endpoint returns 404 for nonexistent, 400 for invalid fields, requires auth. Admin login is at /admin (not /admin/login).
